response.justification: Bogdan brings exceptional domain expertise in geospatial data platforms and high-scale distributed systems, along with a rigorous approach to testing and QA. While his recent experience lacks the primary required languages (Modern C++ or Rust), his deep background in a similar compiled language (DLang) for low-latency microservices, combined with his GIS background, suggests he could quickly adapt to the stack and add significant value to the routing pipeline.
strengths: Deep domain expertise in geospatial data processing and mapping platforms (Founder of GISCollective, Open Green Map).
Proven experience building low-latency, high-throughput distributed systems handling millions of requests per second.
Exceptional background in software quality assurance, TDD, and building automated testing frameworks.
concerns: Lacks recent professional experience with modern C++ or Rust, relying heavily on DLang, TypeScript, and Node.js in recent years.
No direct mention of routing algorithms or navigation guidance solutions, despite the strong general GIS background.
Primary recent focus has been on full-stack web and AI-agent infrastructure rather than purely backend data pipelines.
